What's New In rPickle 0.6
====================================

:Release: 2026-06-27
:Version: 0.6.0

New Extensions
--------------

- ``Path_ext``
- ``defaultdict_ext``
- Built-in extensions total: 6

Documentation
-------------

- Extension composition example (``|``)
- Custom extension inheritance example (``|=``)
- Security recommendation: avoid ``eval()``, ``exec()``, ``__import__()``

Testing
-------

- 41 tests
